# common/CMakeLists.txt - bstorm_util_litert library
# Portions generated by AI

add_library(bstorm_util_litert STATIC
  bstorm_util_litert.cc
)

target_include_directories(bstorm_util_litert PUBLIC
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
)

target_link_libraries(bstorm_util_litert PUBLIC
  bstorm_core_shared
)
